name: Kharisma Bangsa School

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. H. Montong No. 120, Ciganjur, Jagakarsa, Jakarta Selatan 12630, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Kharisma Bangsa is a practical choice for families wanting Cambridge qualifications without the price tag of premium schools.
paragraphs: Parents say Kharisma Bangsa is a practical choice for families wanting Cambridge qualifications without the price tag of premium schools.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$6.4K – US$7.9K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: 4-hectare campus, Boarding facilities, Apple-equipped classrooms, Interactive boards, Science laboratories.

metaDescription: Kharisma Bangsa School (South Jakarta). Parents say Kharisma Bangsa is a practical choice for families wanting Cambridge qualifications without the price tag of premium schools.…
